_comment: Example data for templates/power-rankings.html. Copy this, change the values, run: node scripts/render.js power-rankings data/your-file.json --png
footer_line: Rankings are subjective, final, and designed to make you mad · LFF Est. 2020

teams.note: Undefeated and unbearable. The team to beat, sadly.
Dropped 141 and still found something to complain about.
Quietly good. Loudly annoying. A dangerous combo.
Boring, efficient, winning. The Toyota Camry of the league.
Beat the Prophets and immediately told everyone about it.
A tie. In fantasy football. Take a bow, genius.
Lost by 0.2. Somewhere, a kicker is to blame.
Prophesied a title. Currently prophesying the toilet bowl.
Choked away a tie. Framed it as "a moral win."
Enforcing nothing. Not even a competent lineup.
Living up to the name with alarming consistency.
Projected first. Buying the trophy. See you at the bottom.
